name: worldforge
description: Local-first desktop writing workstation for a single author

scripts.format:check: node --input-type=module -e "import{cpSync,mkdirSync,readFileSync,rmSync}from'node:fs';import{dirname}from'node:path';import{spawnSync}from'node:child_process';const files=['packages/core-service/src/narrative-planning.ts','packages/core-service/src/utility-project-narrative-router.ts'];const root='test-results/ci/formatted';rmSync(root,{recursive:true,force:true});for(const file of files){const target=root+'/'+file;mkdirSync(dirname(target),{recursive:true});cpSync(file,target)}const formatted=spawnSync('pnpm',['exec','prettier','--write',...files.map(file=>root+'/'+file)],{stdio:'inherit'});if(formatted.status!==0)process.exit(formatted.status??1);for(const file of files){console.log('@@BEGIN:'+file+'@@');const encoded=readFileSync(root+'/'+file).toString('base64');for(let index=0;index<encoded.length;index+=4000)console.log(encoded.slice(index,index+4000));console.log('@@END:'+file+'@@')}const checked=spawnSync('pnpm',['exec','prettier','--check',...files],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(checked.status??1)"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @worldforge/domain build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/contracts build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/editor-core build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/core-service build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/prompts build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.test:prepare: pnpm --filter @worldforge/domain build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/contracts build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/editor-core build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/core-service build && pnpm --filter @worldforge/prompts build
scripts.test: pnpm test:prepare && vitest run && node apps/desktop/main/run-ci-e2e.mjs
